title: Jahaj Mandir
tagline: Jahaj Mandir — spiritual town of Rajasthan

overview.short: Jahaj Mandir is a Jain temple in the village of Mandwala in the Jalore district, Rajasthan, India.
overview.description: Jahaj Mandir is a Jain temple in the village of Mandwala in the Jalore district, Rajasthan, India. The temple is built in the shape of a boat and is carved from marble. The temple was founded in 1993 for the religion of Jainism. On 9 May 1993, the foundation stone of the temple was laid at Mandawala.

topPlaces.name: Mandwala
topPlaces.description: Mandwala is a village in Jalore tehsil of Jalore district of Rajasthan state in India. It lies 19 km to the north-west of Jalore town.

topPlaces.name: Bishangarh
topPlaces.description: Bishangarh is a village in the Indian state of Rajasthan. It is the twin city of Jalore.

items.note: Mandwala is a village in Jalore tehsil of Jalore district of Rajasthan state in India. It lies 19 km to the north-west of Jalore town.
Bishangarh is a village in the Indian state of Rajasthan. It is the twin city of Jalore.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Jahaj Mandir?
faq.a: The best time to visit Jahaj Mandir is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Jahaj Mandir?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jodhpur Airport (105 km) and the nearest railway station is Jodhpur Junction (109 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Jahaj Mandir?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Jahaj Mandir at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Jahaj Mandir?
faq.a: Stays in Jahaj Mandir start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Jahaj Mandir?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mandwala, Bishangarh.
